title: IBM Completes Confluent Acquisition, Ushering in Real
description: In a move poised to ripple across the tech landscape, IBM completes Confluent acquisition, locking in a deal that could redefine how businesses harness real-time data for artificial intelligence. IBM confirmed it has finalized its purchase of Confluent, Inc., a platform trusted by more than 6,500 enterprises—including 40% of the Fortune 500—to power live, data-driven IBM completes Confluent acquisition to power real-time AI data across enterprise systems globally.

title: AI Drone Software Stock Jumps 520% in Best IPO Since Newsmax
description: Swarmer Inc. shares skyrocketed as much as 700% on Tuesday, making the artificial intelligence drone software company’s debut the best trading by a US stock since Newsmax Inc.’s blockbuster entry nearly a year ago.
content:
(Bloomberg) -- Swarmer Inc. shares skyrocketed as much as 700% on Tuesday, making the artificial intelligence drone software company’s debut the best trading by a US stock since Newsmax Inc.’s blockbuster entry nearly a year ago.

title: Commentary: What is a higher education worth?
description: University of South Carolina professors write that a well-rounded education has enduring significance in an increasingly artificial intelligence-driven world.
content:
We commonly hear parents, students and politicians questioning “the value proposition” of a higher education. This is almost always done exclusively in monetary terms.

title: Amazon's AI Vision: Doubling AWS's Future
description: Amazon's CEO Andy Jassy predicts artificial intelligence will elevate Amazon Web Services (AWS) to $600 billion in annual sales, doubling previous forecasts. Despite Wall Street skepticism over a $200 billion AI investment, Jassy sees robust demand. Amazon also hinted at its first million drone deliveries this year.

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Amazon's AI Vision: Doubling AWS's Future
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.
